staticCommands.description: Notify docker containers about changes in mounted volumes.

options.description: Glob pattern to filter containers. Without providing a pattern, notifiers will get attached to each running container.
Enable or disable filtering sync changes based on gitignore file
Enable more verbose and rich logging.
